prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约7936→8584→9024→9640→12400，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约4464名，2025年基准约12400名，较2024年大幅后移2 760名，降幅明显；本省物理类计划2021年58人、2022年56人、2023年57人、2024年54人、2025年57人；2026年计划61人，较2025年增加4人（扩招约7%） ，扩招将导致竞争略有缓解，位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第70名，近年排名稳定在64–70名区间，属中上游 211；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端舆情（贾浅浅论文抄袭事件），可能对报考热度产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第81位（一般），短视频曝光量 较低；历史投档异常记录中未见西北大学断档信号；地质学A、考古学A、软件工程A-为该校王牌学科，其中软件工程与当前计算机类热门专业直接相关，对物理 类考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与西北大学开设的计算机类、电子信息类、软件工程等专业高度契合；本省2026年普通高考总人数218700人，较2025年（约179817人）明显增加，竞争加剧；西北大学位于陕西西安，与甘肃 相邻，对甘肃考生具有天然地域吸引力，且该校在甘肃招生人数占比较小（约2.3%），招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+4人 ）缓解竞争、本省考生总数增加加剧竞争、声誉偏负面抑制热度等因素，在2025年基准12400名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约13000名，区间12700–13300名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 7936 → 8584 → 9024 → 9640 → 12400, showing a continuous backward trend. Over the past 4 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 4464 places. The 2025 baseline is about 12400, a significant drop of 2760 places compared to 2024. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 58 in 2021, 56 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 54 in 2024, and 57 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 61, an increase of 4 (about 7% expansion) compared to 2025, which will slightly ease competition and increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 70th, with a stable range of 64–70 in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to academic misconduct incidents (Jia Qianqian's paper plagiarism controversy), which may suppress application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 81st (average), with low short video exposure. No historical admission anomalies (e.g., gaps) have been recorded for Northwest University. Its ace disciplines include Geology (A), Archaeology (A), and Software Engineering (A-), with Software Engineering directly related to the popular computer field, attracting Physics Category applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly recommended, aligning well with Northwest University's offerings in Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Software Engineering. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is 218,700, a significant increase from about 179,817 in 2025, intensifying competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Gansu, offering natural geographical appeal to Gansu applicants. Its enrollment in Gansu accounts for a small proportion (about 2.3%), with stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+4) easing competition, the increase in total provincial examinees intensifying competition, and the negative reputation suppressing enthusiasm, the ranking is expected to continue shifting backward from the 2025 baseline of 12400. The predicted minimum ranking is about 13000, with a range of 12700–13300.

Tier 1 (Most Competitive)

- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Software Engineering)
- Electronic Information (Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology)
- Artificial Intelligence

Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Physics (Physics, Applied Physics, Materials Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Chemistry (Applied Chemistry, Chemical Biology, Materials Chemistry)
- Information and Computing Science (Cybersecurity Experimental Class)
- Geology (Base Class/Planetary Science Innovation Class)
- Cultural Heritage Preservation Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceuticals (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmaceutical Engineering, Energy Chemical Engineering)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Bioengineering/Biotechnology
- Pharmacy (Pharmacy, Chinese Materia Medica)
- Urban and Rural Planning (National Land Spatial Planning Direction)
- Emergency Management (Smart Emergency Innovation Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12700–13300, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices, with Tier 1 majors as reach options (Clinical Medicine and Computer Science historically rank around 4700–7100, requiring rankings significantly above the upper limit), and Tier 3 majors as safety options. Northwest University's ace disciplines—Geology (A), Archaeology (A), and Software Engineering (A-)—are worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) approximately changed from 1728 to 1352 to 1176 to 1603 to 1978, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising then falling. The 2025 baseline is about 1978, the lowest in the past 5 years (largest ranking number). The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 22 in 2021, 24 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 20 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 15, a decrease of 5 from 2025 (a 25% reduction), which will significantly intensify competition, leading to a smaller ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 70th, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with strong appeal to liberal arts students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct controversies (the Jia Qianqian plagiarism incident), which may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranks 81st (average), with relatively low short video exposure. Archaeology, rated A, is the university's flagship discipline, highly aligned with History Category majors (Archaeology, History), strongly attracting liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular, matching Northwest University's offerings in Law and Chinese Language and Literature categories. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is 218,700, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Gansu, providing natural geographical appeal to Gansu students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking is already at a 5-year low, the 2026 plan significantly reduces enrollment (-5, -25%) intensifying competition, the increase in total examinees, and the strong appeal of the A-rated Archaeology discipline, the ranking is expected to move forward (smaller ranking number) from the 2025 baseline of 1978. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1700, with a range of 1650–1750.
